message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "user" as user
rectangle "InspectionSheetForm" as InspectionSheetForm
rectangle "EquipmentForm" as EquipmentForm
rectangle "InspectionItemForm" as InspectionItemForm
rectangle "InspectionItemDialog" as InspectionItemDialog
rectangle "InspectionSheetContext" as InspectionSheetContext
rectangle "InspectionItemContext" as InspectionItemContext

rectangle "Add New Equipment" as AddNewEquipment
rectangle "Remove Equipment" as RemoveEquipment
rectangle "Update Equipment" as UpdateEquipment
rectangle "Add Insepection Item" as AddInsepectionItem
rectangle "Remove Insepection Item" as RemoveInsepectionItem
rectangle "Edit Insepection Item" as EditInsepectionItem

rectangle "alt [編集を適用する場合]" as AltApplyEdit
rectangle "alt [編集を適用しない場合]" as AltNoApplyEdit

user -> InspectionSheetForm : 点検機器追加ボタンをクリック
InspectionSheetForm -> EquipmentForm : 点検機器追加
EquipmentForm -> InspectionSheetContext : 点検シート情報
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 描画処理
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 表示結果
InspectionSheetForm <- user : 更新後の表示結果

user -> InspectionSheetForm : 点検機器削除ボタンをクリック
InspectionSheetForm -> EquipmentForm : 点検機器削除
EquipmentForm -> InspectionSheetContext : 点検シート情報
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 描画処理
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 表示結果
InspectionSheetForm <- user : 更新後の表示結果

user -> InspectionSheetForm : 点検機器情報編集
InspectionSheetForm -> EquipmentForm : 点検機器情報編集
EquipmentForm -> InspectionSheetContext : 点検シート情報
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 描画処理
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 表示結果
InspectionSheetForm <- user : 更新後の表示結果

user -> InspectionSheetForm : 点検項目追加ボタンをクリック
InspectionSheetForm -> InspectionItemForm : 追加モードに設定
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemForm : 新規点検項目を設定
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検項目ダイアログを開く
InspectionSheetForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目ダイアロ表示
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検項目編集
InspectionItemContext -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目情報
InspectionSheetForm <- user : 更新後の表示結果

alt [編集を適用する場合]
user -> InspectionItemForm : OKボタンをクリック
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検項目情報を取得
InspectionItemContext -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目情報
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検項目を追加
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目ダイアログを閉じる
InspectionSheetForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検シート情報
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionSheetContext : 描画処理
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 表示結果
InspectionSheetForm <- user : 更新後の表示結果
else [編集を適用しない場合]
user -> InspectionItemForm : キャンセルボタンをクリック
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目ダイアログを閉じる
end

user -> InspectionSheetForm : 点検項目削除ボタンをクリック
InspectionSheetForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目削除
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検シート情報
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 描画処理
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 表示結果
InspectionSheetForm <- user : 更新後の表示結果

user -> InspectionSheetForm : 点検項目編集ボタンをクリック
InspectionSheetForm -> InspectionItemForm : 更新モードに設定
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検項目情報を取得
InspectionItemContext -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目情報
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 新規点検項目を設定
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目ダイアログを開く
InspectionSheetForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目ダイアロ表示
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検項目編集
InspectionItemContext -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目情報
InspectionSheetForm <- user : 更新後の表示結果

alt [編集を適用する場合]
user -> InspectionItemForm : OKボタンをクリック
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検項目情報を取得
InspectionItemContext -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目情報
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemContext : 点検項目を追加
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目ダイアログを閉じる
InspectionSheetForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検シート情報
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionSheetContext : 描画処理
InspectionSheetContext -> InspectionSheetContext : 表示結果
InspectionSheetForm <- user : 更新後の表示結果
else [編集を適用しない場合]
user -> InspectionItemForm : キャンセルボタンをクリック
InspectionItemForm -> InspectionItemForm : 点検項目ダイアログを閉じる
end

@enduml
